examples: Glows and grows in the murk of his brain.
Murk, dreariness in the hushed manor house; flies asleep on the ceiling.
Some teachers went to school to support students who had chosen to brave the murk and attend class.
The lights of the skyscrapers below glow like burning cigarette ends through the murk of twilight.
But there was more to the novel than that something that squirmed in the murk of its motivations.
